business.name: Carolina's Best painting & drywall services, LLP
business.tagline: When walls need fixing, we make them perfect

hero.headline: Eric and Ace Fix What Others *Can't Touch*
hero.subheadline: 66 five-star reviews say it all — boat holes, ceiling patches, full repaints. We show up, we fix it right, we're done.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Walls, Ceilings, Paint — All of It
services_section.subheading: From accidental boat holes to full home repaints, we handle the messy stuff so you don't have to

services.title: Drywall Repair & Patching
services.description: Holes, cracks, water damage — we patch it up and make it look like nothing ever happened. Your garage wall will thank you.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: Fresh paint that actually lasts. We prep right, paint clean, and leave your place looking better than you imagined.

services.title: Ceiling Repairs & Painting
services.description: Kitchen ceiling looking rough? We patch, prime, and paint until it's smooth as new. No streaks, no mess left behind.

services.title: Complete Wall Restoration
services.description: When contractors leave you with torn-up drywall, we come in and make it right. Clean lines, perfect finish, done properly.

about.heading: Eric & Ace — Columbia's Wall Fixers
about.body: We're the team Columbia calls when walls need real work. Whether it's a boat-sized hole in your garage or a full house repaint, we show up with the right tools and get it done right. Professional, honest, and detailed — that's how we've earned 66 five-star reviews across Columbia.

reviews.name: Quinton T.
reviews.text: Eric and Ace were incredible — professional, honest, and super detailed. They fixed my drywall perfectly, looks brand new!

reviews.name: Imani L.
reviews.text: Amazing paint job on my whole house! Wish someone had told me about Carolina's Best sooner instead of wasting time with other painters.

reviews.name: Jon M.
reviews.text: They fixed the hole I made backing my boat into the garage wall. No fuss pricing, speedy repair, great conversation. Welcome back anytime!

reviews.name: Olga I.
reviews.text: Very professional and punctual. Did a perfect job patching and painting our kitchen ceiling. Very reasonable pricing too!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: We cover the greater Columbia area and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Those Walls?
cta.body: No fuss estimates, honest pricing, and work that actually lasts. Call Eric and Ace today and see why Columbia keeps calling us back.
